arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the dedicated IP pool.

dedicated_ips.description: A list of dedicated IPs in the pool, each with its warm-up percentage and status.

id.description: The unique identifier for the dedicated IP pool.

scaling_mode.description: The scaling mode of the dedicated IP pool, indicating how it scales its resources.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the dedicated IP pool.
